# Get quantum-ready with IonQ’s Applications team
Consulting services from IonQ’s quantum scientists and application developers
[Get in touch](https://www.ionq.com/applications-services#get-started)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/68fb886b64f8df6e38b00d4f_Post%20template%20page%20Hero%20v2%20\(7\).avif)
Advance access to the   
latest IonQ hardware  

  * Be among the first customer workloads on our experimental quantum systems
  * Tackle larger problems that demand the most advanced technology


Support from the best researchers in the industry  

  * Partner with experts in both IonQ hardware and quantum software development
  * Jumpstart quantum efforts while ensuring the most value possible from compute investments


Solutions for every stage of your quantum journey  

  * Custom engagements anchored in driving enterprise value
  * Support for organizations with limited quantum expertise as well as organizations with dedicated quantum efforts already underway


## Quantum   
progress, realized
The IonQ application team works with customer teams at all stages of the quantum journey. Our bespoke approach means we can build an engagement that supports your quantum goals, whatever they are.
[ [ Prepare ] Baseline problem set Many organizations start with a rough outline of the problems they would like to explore with quantum solutions.   
  
If needed, IonQ can help identify this baseline problem set. What IonQ offers:
  * Quantum Consulting
  * Application Roadmap

Get started ](https://www.ionq.com/applications-services#get-started)[ [ Build ] Application development IonQ’s application team can either work hand in hand with your experts to build quantum algorithms or build and deliver turnkey solutions to explore how quantum might be able to offer advantage over existing, classical approaches.  
What IonQ offers:
  * Priority Access to Latest QPUs
  * Application Development
  * Easy Integration
  * Optimized for trapped ions
  * NISQ Support
  * Synthesis and Optimization

Get started ](https://www.ionq.com/applications-services#get-started)[ [ Expand ] Identify new problems If your organization has already experimented with quantum and are looking for a partner to help optimize your algorithms for trapped ions or expand the use of your existing applications to new problem spaces, the IonQ application team can help.  
What IonQ offers:
  * Quantum Consulting
  * Application Development Playbook
  * Optimized for Trapped Ions

Get started ](https://www.ionq.com/applications-services#get-started)
## Explore applications areas
Product development
Risk management and finance
Supply chain, manufacturing and operations
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/68e5044b338b11211e033d99_image%2049.avif)
Some of the most profitable product development applications of classical computation are reaching their limits. Quantum approaches can expand the research and development horizon. Areas of interest for our application team include, but are not limited to:
  * Computer vision and image recognition
  * Materials research
  * Natural language processing
  * High tech electronics
  * Pharmaceuticals
  * Human and computer interfaces
  * Geo exploration


![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/68e5044bad03493532484708_image%2050.avif)
Quantum modeling approaches have shown promise in both their ability to scale to complex problems and in their prediction accuracy. A variety of application areas have been explored by our applications team, with more in consideration:
  * Portfolio balancing and optimization
  * Credit and lending models
  * Procurement risk and analysis
  * Project sequencing


![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/68e5044bb28b8b8d58336399_image%2051.avif)
The most complex logistical and sequencing challenges have long represented optimization value opportunities. Quantum solutions are refocusing on capturing this value across the following areas, and more:
  * Supply chain management
  * Package loading optimization
  * Predictive maintenance
  * Shipping and logistics
  * Fleet management


## Not sure how to get started? IonQ’s Applications team can help.
The IonQ Application Team can support you on your quantum journey. Quantum scientists can help you identify, test and build quantum solutions for your business  

[Get access](https://www.ionq.com/get-started#leave-your-info)

## Example application development process
Every engagement is customized based on organizational needs, but in general, our co-development process is anchored in several development milestones.
[ Phase 1 ]
### Discovery
Our researchers and quantum developers start every engagement immersing themselves in your business and computational challenges.
  * Review existing classical libraries and data sets
  * Align on target outcomes and project goals
  * Develop project plan


[ Phase 2 ]
### Algorithm development
The applications team can work hand in hand with your developers or can run experimentation for you to develop novel quantum algorithms to experiment with on IonQ hardware.
  * Workshops and collaborative working sessions
  * Algorithm development and refinement


[ Phase 3 ]
### Analysis
With access to the most powerful quantum systems in the world, the applications team can deploy the applications on QPUs to analyze the performance and project forward looking opportunities.
  * Execute algorithms on IonQ quantum hardware
  * Performance report and summary
  * Delivery of software libraries


[ Phase 4 ]
### Application delivery
Conscious to not end engagements with a software handoff only, the Applications Team remains engaged after application delivery to ensure the successful deployment and use of new quantum algorithms.
  * Educational support
  * Expansion opportunities
  * Target outcome and project goal review

  if (window.innerWidth >= 992) {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
      var navRoot = document.querySelector('.navigation');
      var navBg = document.querySelector('.nav-dd-list-bg');
      var navOverlay = document.querySelector('.nav-close-overlay');
      var navDropdowns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.nav-dropdown.w-dropdown'));

      var navOverlayDelayTimeout = null;
      var navIsSwitching = false;
      var navOverlayIsVisible = false;

      function navGetListAndInner(navDropdown) {
        var navList = navDropdown.querySelector('.w-dropdown-list');
        if (!navList) return { list: null, inner: null };
        var navInner = navList.firstElementChild || navList;
        return { list: navList, inner: navInner };
      }

      function navAnyOpen() {
        return navDropdowns.some(function(navDD) {
          var pair = navGetListAndInner(navDD);
          return pair.list && pair.list.classList.contains('w--open');
        });
      }

      function navShowOverlayImmediate() {
        if (!navOverlay) return;
        if (navOverlayIsVisible) return;
        navOverlayIsVisible = true;
        navOverlay.style.display = "block";
        navOverlay.style.opacity = "0";
        requestAnimationFrame(function() {
          navOverlay.style.transition = "opacity 250ms ease";
          navOverlay.style.opacity = "1";
        });
      }

      function navHideOverlayImmediate() {
        if (!navOverlay) return;
        navOverlay.style.transition = "opacity 250ms ease";
        navOverlay.style.opacity = "0";
        setTimeout(function() {
          navOverlay.style.display = "none";
          navOverlayIsVisible = false;
        }, 250);
      }

      function navUpdateOverlay(triggeredFromClick) {
        clearTimeout(navOverlayDelayTimeout);
        var openExists = navAnyOpen();

        if (!openExists) {
          if (navIsSwitching) {
            navOverlayDelayTimeout = setTimeout(function() {
              if (!navAnyOpen()) {
                navHideOverlayImmediate();
                if (navRoot) {
                  navRoot.classList.remove('open');
                }
                navIsSwitching = false;
              }
            }, 170);
          } else {
            navHideOverlayImmediate();
            if (navRoot) {
              navRoot.classList.remove('open');
            }
            navIsSwitching = false;
          }
          return;
        }

        navIsSwitching = false;

        if (navRoot) {
          navRoot.classList.add('open');
        }

        if (triggeredFromClick === true) {
          navShowOverlayImmediate();
        }
      }

      function navUpdateBgHeight() {
        var navOpen = null;

        navDropdowns.forEach(function(navDD) {
          var pair = navGetListAndInner(navDD);
          if (pair.list && pair.list.classList.contains('w--open')) {
            navOpen = pair;
          }
        });

        if (!navOpen) {
          if (navBg) {
            navBg.style.height = '0px';
          }
          navUpdateOverlay(false);
          return;
        }

        var h1 = navOpen.inner.scrollHeight;
        var h2 = navRoot ? navRoot.offsetHeight || 0 : 0;
        if (navBg) {
          navBg.style.height = (h1 + h2) + 'px';
        }
        navUpdateOverlay(true);
      }

      navDropdowns.forEach(function(navDD) {
        var navToggle = navDD.querySelector('.w-dropdown-toggle');
        if (!navToggle) return;

        navToggle.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
          e.stopPropagation();
          var anyOpenNow = navAnyOpen();
          var pair = navGetListAndInner(navDD);
          var thisIsOpen = pair.list && pair.list.classList.contains('w--open');
          if (anyOpenNow && !thisIsOpen) {
            navIsSwitching = true;
          } else {
            navIsSwitching = false;
          }
        });

        $(window).on("scroll", function () {
          var pair = navGetListAndInner(navDD);
          if (pair.list && pair.list.classList.contains("w--open")) {
            $(navDD).trigger('w-close.w-dropdown');
            if (navBg) {
              navBg.style.height = '0px';
            }
            clearTimeout(navOverlayDelayTimeout);
            navHideOverlayImmediate();
            if (navRoot) {
              navRoot.classList.remove('open');
            }
            navIsSwitching = false;
          }
        });
      });

      navDropdowns.forEach(function(navDD) {
        var pair = navGetListAndInner(navDD);
        if (!pair.list) return;

        var observer = new MutationObserver(function() {
          navUpdateBgHeight();
        });

        observer.observe(pair.list, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class', 'style'] });
      });

      if (navOverlay) {
        navOverlay.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
          e.stopPropagation();
          navDropdowns.forEach(function(navDD) {
            $(navDD).trigger('w-close.w-dropdown');
          });
          if (navBg) {
            navBg.style.height = '0px';
          }
          clearTimeout(navOverlayDelayTimeout);
          navHideOverlayImmediate();
          if (navRoot) {
            navRoot.classList.remove('open');
          }
          navIsSwitching = false;
        });
      }

      document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        if (!navAnyOpen()) return;
        if (!e.target.closest('.nav-dropdown')) {
          navDropdowns.forEach(function(navDD) {
            $(navDD).trigger('w-close.w-dropdown');
          });
          if (navBg) {
            navBg.style.height = '0px';
          }
          clearTimeout(navOverlayDelayTimeout);
          navHideOverlayImmediate();
          if (navRoot) {
            navRoot.classList.remove('open');
          }
          navIsSwitching = false;
        }
      });

    });
  }
</script>

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const COOKIE_PREFIX = "__Secure-Session-US-Web";
  const COOKIE_DOMAIN = ".ionq.com";

  function getCookieByPrefix(prefix) {
    const row = document.cookie
      .split(";")
      .map(r => r.trim())
      .find(r => r.startsWith(prefix));
    return row ? decodeURIComponent(row.split("=")[1]) : null;
  }

  function getCookieNameByPrefix(prefix) {
    const row = document.cookie
      .split(";")
      .map(r => r.trim())
      .find(r => r.startsWith(prefix));
    return row ? row.split("=")[0] : null;
  }

  function deleteIonqSessionCookie() {
    const actualCookieName = getCookieNameByPrefix(COOKIE_PREFIX);
    if (!actualCookieName) return;

    document.cookie =
      actualCookieName +
      "=; Domain=" +
      COOKIE_DOMAIN +
      "; Path=/; Max-Age=0; Secure; SameSite=None";
  }

  async function isIonqUserLoggedIn() {
    const token = getCookieByPrefix(COOKIE_PREFIX);
    if (!token) return false;

    try {
      const res = await fetch("https://api.ionq.co/v0.3/users/me", {
        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` }
      });

      if (res.status !== 200) return false;

      const user = await res.json();
      return !!(user && user.confirmed === true);
    } catch (e) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  function applyAuthVisibility(isLoggedIn) {
    document.querySelectorAll('[auth="off"]').forEach(el => {
      el.style.setProperty("display", isLoggedIn ? "none" : "flex", "important");
    });

    document.querySelectorAll('[auth="on"]').forEach(el => {
      el.style.setProperty("display", isLoggedIn ? "flex" : "none", "important");
    });
  }

  const signOutBtn = document.querySelector('[auth-btn="sign-out"]');
  if (signOutBtn) {
    signOutBtn.addEventListener("click", function () {
      deleteIonqSessionCookie();
      applyAuthVisibility(false);
    });
  }

  isIonqUserLoggedIn().then(isLoggedIn => {
    applyAuthVisibility(isLoggedIn);
  });
});

  const exploreLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.explore-content-tab-link');
  const explorePanes = document.querySelectorAll('.explore-content-tabs-content .explore-content-tab-pane');
  const exploreUnderline = document.querySelector('.explore-content-tab-link-underline');

  function exploreMoveUnderline(exploreTarget) {
    const { offsetLeft, offsetWidth } = exploreTarget;
    exploreUnderline.style.width = `${offsetWidth}px`;
    exploreUnderline.style.left = `${offsetLeft}px`;
  }

  function exploreScrollToTab(exploreTarget, exploreIndex) {
    if (window.innerWidth >= 768) return;

    const exploreMenuWidth = exploreMenu.offsetWidth;
    const exploreLinkWidth = exploreTarget.offsetWidth;
    const exploreLinkLeft = exploreTarget.offsetLeft;

    if (exploreIndex === 0) {
      exploreMenu.scrollTo({ left: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
    } else if (exploreIndex === exploreLinks.length - 1) {
      exploreMenu.scrollTo({ left: exploreMenu.scrollWidth, behavior: 'smooth' });
    } else {
      const exploreScrollPos = exploreLinkLeft - (exploreMenuWidth / 2) + (exploreLinkWidth / 2);
      exploreMenu.scrollTo({ left: exploreScrollPos, behavior: 'smooth' });
    }
  }

  exploreLinks.forEach((exploreLink, exploreIndex) => {
    exploreLink.addEventListener('click', e => {
      e.preventDefault();

      exploreLinks.forEach(l => l.classList.remove('active'));
      exploreLink.classList.add('active');

      explorePanes.forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
      explorePanes[exploreIndex].classList.add('active');

      exploreMoveUnderline(exploreLink);
      exploreScrollToTab(exploreLink, exploreIndex);
    });
  });

  const exploreActiveLink = document.querySelector('.explore-content-tab-link.active');
  if (exploreActiveLink) exploreMoveUnderline(exploreActiveLink);
</script>

</svg></div></a></div></div></div><div class="hidden-js w-embed w-script"><script>
  // --------------------------------------------------------------------
  // MAIN SCRIPT
  // --------------------------------------------------------------------

  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {


    // ####################################
    /**
 * Minimalni JSONP helper – isti princip kao u testMailchimp snippetu.
 * url: baza URL-a (može već da sadrži query parametre)
 * callbackParamName: npr. "c" za Mailchimp
 * cb: function (err, data)
 */
    function jsonp(url, callbackParamName, cb) {
      const callbackName =
            "mcJsonpCallback_" + Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 10);

      const script = document.createElement("script");

      const separator = url.includes("?") ? "&" : "?";
      script.src = url + separator + callbackParamName + "=" + callbackName;

      window[callbackName] = function (data) {
        try {
          cb(null, data);
        } finally {
          delete window[callbackName];
          script.remove();
        }
      };

      script.onerror = function (err) {
        try {
          cb(err || new Error("JSONP network error"));
        } finally {
          delete window[callbackName];
          script.remove();
        }
      };

      document.body.appendChild(script);
    }

    /**
 * Šalje podatke iz forme ka Mailchimpu preko JSONP-a.
 * Očekuje:
 *  - <form mailchimp-url="...">
 *  - inpute sa [data-mailchimp="EMAIL"], [data-mailchimp="NAME"], itd.
 *
 * @param {HTMLFormElement} form
 * @returns {Promise<any>}  // resolve(data) iz Mailchimp-a
 */
    function sendMailchimpFromForm(form) {
      if (!form) {
        return Promise.reject(new Error("Form element nije prosleđen."));
      }

      const mailchimpURL = form.getAttribute("mailchimp-url");
      if (!mailchimpURL) {
        return Promise.reject(
          new Error('Form nema "mailchimp-url" atribut.')
        );
      }

      // Skupi sve fieldove koji imaju data-mailchimp atribut
      const fields = form.querySelectorAll("[data-mailchimp]");

      if (!fields.length) {
        console.error(
          "❌ Form nema nijedan element sa [data-mailchimp] atributom.",
          form
        );
        return Promise.reject(
          new Error("Form nema nijedan [data-mailchimp] field.")
        );
      }

      // Napravi params objekat iz fieldova
      const params = {};
      fields.forEach((field) => {
        const key = field.getAttribute("data-mailchimp"); // npr. "EMAIL", "NAME"
        if (!key) return;

        const value =
              field.value != null
        ? field.value
        : field.getAttribute("value") || "";

        params[key] = value;
      });

      console.log("📝 Mailchimp params iz forme:", params);

      // Umesto toQueryString – koristimo URLSearchParams direktno
      const searchParams = new URLSearchParams();
      Object.keys(params).forEach((key) => {
        const val = params[key];
        if (val != null && val !== "") {
          searchParams.append(key, val);
        }
      });

      const queryString = searchParams.toString();
      if (!queryString) {
        console.error("❌ Query string je prazan iako postoje fieldovi.");
        return Promise.reject(
          new Error("Nema nijednog validnog data-mailchimp parametra.")
        );
      }

      // mailchimpURL već treba da sadrži ?u=...&id=...
      const separator = mailchimpURL.includes("?") ? "&" : "?";
      const requestUrl = mailchimpURL + separator + queryString;

      console.log("🌐 Mailchimp request URL:", requestUrl);

      return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        jsonp(
          requestUrl,
          "c", // Mailchimp callback param, kao u prvom snippetu
          (err, data) => {
            if (err) {
              console.error("Mailchimp JSONP error:", err);
              reject(err);
            } else {
              // console.log("Mailchimp response:", data);
              resolve(data);
            }
          }
        );
      });
    }

    //######################################

    const DEBUG_MODE = true;

    function log(message, data) {
      if (DEBUG_MODE) console.log(message, data || "");
    }

    // --- UTILS ---

    function getGoogleAnalyticsClientId() {
      try {
        const match = document.cookie.match(/_ga=GA1\.1\.(\d+\.\d+)/);
        return match ? match[1] : null;
      } catch (e) {
        return null;
      }
    }

    function getReferrerIds(queryString) {
      const params = new URLSearchParams(queryString);
      const keys = [
        "utm_source",
        "utm_medium",
        "utm_campaign",
        "utm_content",
        "utm_term",
        "gclid",
        "fbclid",
        "msclkid",
        "li_fat_id"
      ];
      const result = {};
      keys.forEach((key) => {
        if (params.has(key)) result[key] = params.get(key);
      });
      return result;
    }

    // --- INTEGRACIJA SA formState (validation handler) ---

    const trackedForms = document.querySelectorAll('form[data-tracker="true"]');

    // Ako formState ne postoji (validation skripta nije učitana) → ne radimo ništa
    if (typeof formState === "undefined") {
      log("[Segment handler] formState nije definisan, preskačem registraciju onComplete handlera.");
    } else {
      trackedForms.forEach((form) => {
        const func = () => {
          // code
          handleFormSubmit(form);
          //############################
          //funkcija za mailchimp
          const mailchimpUrl = form.getAttribute("mailchimp-url");
          if (mailchimpUrl && mailchimpUrl.trim() !== "") {
            sendMailchimpFromForm(form)
              .then((data) => {
              console.log("✅ Mailchimp response:", data);
            })
              .catch((err) => {
              console.error("❌ Greška pri slanju ka Mailchimpu:", err);
            });
          }
          // ###########################
        };
        // email-form-1 == form ID
        formState[form.id] = {
          onComplete: func
        };
        log("[Segment handler] Registered formState handler for:", form.id);
      });
    }

    // --- GLAVNA LOGIKA ---

    function handleFormSubmit(form) {
      log("Form submit detected. Processing...", form);

      const segmentIdentify = {};
      const segmentTrack = {};

      const gaId = getGoogleAnalyticsClientId();
      const formNameAttr = form.getAttribute("data-form-name");
      const formMode = form.getAttribute("data-form-mode") || "track";
      const urlMode = form.getAttribute("data-url-mode") || "track";
      const eventName =
            form.getAttribute("data-segment-event") || "Form Submit";

      const minimalSegment =
            form.getAttribute("data-segment-minimal") === "true";
      const shouldIdentify =
            form.getAttribute("data-segment-identify") !== "false";

      const disableFormUrl =
            form.getAttribute("data-segment-url") === "disabled";

      const inputs = form.querySelectorAll("input, select, textarea");

      inputs.forEach((input) => {
        // 0) Globalni skip + submit dugmad
        if (
          input.type === "submit" ||
          input.getAttribute("data-skip") === "true"
        )
          return;

        // 1) vrednost (posebno za checkbox/radio)
        let value = input.value;

        const segmentOverride = input.getAttribute("data-segment-value");
        if (segmentOverride !== null) {
          value = segmentOverride;
        }

        if (input.type === "checkbox" || input.type === "radio") {
          if (!input.checked) return; // ne šaljemo unchecked
          if (segmentOverride === null) {
            value = input.value || true;
          }
        }
        if (value == null || value === "") return;

        const rawName = input.name || input.id || "unknown_field";

        // SEGMENT kontrola
        const segmentMode = input.getAttribute("data-segment-mode") || "both";
        const segmentKey =
              input.getAttribute("data-segment-key") || rawName;

        // 2) Specijalni slučajevi – PRE generičke logike
        const identity = input.getAttribute("data-identity");
        const isEmail = identity === "email" || input.type === "email";

        // 2.1 Marketing consent
        if (input.getAttribute("data-consent") === "marketing") {
          segmentIdentify["marketing_contact"] = "Marketing contact";
          return;
        }

        // 2.2 Full name
        if (identity === "full_name") {
          const parts = value.trim().split(/\s+/);
          const fName = parts.shift() || "";
          const lName = parts.join(" ");

          const fullNameMode = input.getAttribute("data-segment-mode") || "identify";
          if (fullNameMode !== "none") {
            if (fullNameMode === "identify" || fullNameMode === "both") {
              segmentIdentify["first_name"] = fName;
              if (lName) {
                segmentIdentify["last_name"] = lName;
              }
            }
            if (fullNameMode === "track" || fullNameMode === "both") {
              segmentTrack["first_name"] = fName;
              if (lName) {
                segmentTrack["last_name"] = lName;
              }
            }
          }
          return;
        }

        // 2.3 Email
        if (isEmail) {
          const emailMode = input.getAttribute("data-segment-mode") || "identify";
          if (emailMode !== "none") {
            if (emailMode === "identify" || emailMode === "both") {
              segmentIdentify["email"] = value;
            }
            if (emailMode === "track" || emailMode === "both") {
              segmentTrack["email"] = value;
            }
          }
          return;
        }

        // 2.4 First name
        if (identity === "first_name") {
          const firstNameMode = input.getAttribute("data-segment-mode") || "identify";
          if (firstNameMode !== "none") {
            if (firstNameMode === "identify" || firstNameMode === "both") {
              segmentIdentify["first_name"] = value;
            }
            if (firstNameMode === "track" || firstNameMode === "both") {
              segmentTrack["first_name"] = value;
            }
          }
          return;
        }

        // 2.5 Last name
        if (identity === "last_name") {
          const lastNameMode = input.getAttribute("data-segment-mode") || "identify";
          if (lastNameMode !== "none") {
            if (lastNameMode === "identify" || lastNameMode === "both") {
              segmentIdentify["last_name"] = value;
            }
            if (lastNameMode === "track" || lastNameMode === "both") {
              segmentTrack["last_name"] = value;
            }
          }
          return;

      };

      if (formNameAttr) {
        metadata.form_name = formNameAttr;
      }

      if (!disableFormUrl) {
        metadata.form_url = window.location.href;
      }

      const referrerData = getReferrerIds(window.location.search);

      if (window.analytics) {

        if (minimalSegment) {

        if (categoryAttr) {

        const labelAttr = form.getAttribute("data-segment-label");
        if (labelAttr) {

        }

        if (formMode === "identify") {
          delete finalTrack.form_name;
        }
        if (urlMode === "identify") {
          delete finalTrack.form_url;
        }

        window.analytics.track(eventName, finalTrack);

        if (shouldIdentify && segmentIdentify.email) {
          const finalIdentify = {
            ...metadata,
            ...referrerData,
            ...segmentIdentify
          };

          if (formMode === "track") {
            delete finalIdentify.form_name;
          }
          if (urlMode === "track") {
            delete finalIdentify.form_url;
          }

          window.analytics.identify(finalIdentify);

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {

  const zapierForms = document.querySelectorAll("form[data-zapier-url]");

  zapierForms.forEach((form) => {

    form.addEventListener("submit", function () {

      // do not continue to submit to zapier if the form is not valid
      if (!form.checkValidity()) return;
      
      const zapierUrl = form.getAttribute("data-zapier-url");
      if (!zapierUrl) return;

      const fields = form.querySelectorAll("[data-zapier]");
      const payload = {};

      fields.forEach((field) => {
        const key = field.getAttribute("data-zapier");
        let value = field.value;

        // 🔥 NEW: skip all unchecked radios
        if (field.type === "radio") {
          if (!field.checked) return;    // ignore all unselected radios
          value = field.value;           // selected value
        }

        // checkbox -> true/false
        if (field.type === "checkbox") {
          value = field.checked ? true : false;
        }

        if (value != null && value !== "") {
          payload[key] = value;
        }
      });

      payload.submissionTime = new Date().toISOString();

      console.log("🔄 Sending Zapier payload:", payload);

      fetch(zapierUrl, {
        method: "POST",
        headers: {
          "Content-Type": "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"
        },
        body: new URLSearchParams(payload).toString()
      })
        .then((res) => res.text())
        .then((data) => {
          console.log("✅ Zapier response:", data);
          const redirectUrl =
            form.getAttribute("data-redirect") ||
            form.getAttribute("redirect");
        
          if (redirectUrl) {
            window.location.href = redirectUrl;
          }
        })
        .catch((err) => {
          console.error("❌ Zapier error:", err);
        });

    });

  });

});
